name: Fleming Companies, Inc.
description: Fleming Companies, Inc. was a major American food distribution company founded in 1915 and headquartered in Dallas, Texas. At its peak, it was one of the largest food wholesalers in the United States, supplying grocery stores, supermarkets, and convenience stores nationwide, including serving as the primary distributor for Kmart. The company faced severe financial difficulties and accounting scandals in the early 2000s, leading to a Chapter 11 bankruptcy filing in 2003 and the subsequent sale and liquidation of its assets.
